title: Thematic Superheroes
description: Team up as Batman or Wonder Woman on Thematic’s official server! Craft gadgets, resize with Pehkui, and roleplay with friends in Minecraft 1.20.1. Featuring Mr Fantastic, Superman, Invincible, Batman, Deadpool
body:
# <center>THEMATIC</center>

### 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MMeK2mDC3zw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[![wakatime](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/a633046a-a112-4b51-8a16-3ddbc81b3ad3/project/2ecc3238-053f-4458-9e5a-114b9681f476.svg)](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/a633046a-a112-4b51-8a16-3ddbc81b3ad3/project/2ecc3238-053f-4458-9e5a-114b9681f476)

## ⚡ BECOME YOUR FAVORITE HERO (OR VILLAIN)

**Thematic** transforms Minecraft into the ultimate superhero playground. Don iconic suits with unique powers and abilities from your favorite comics, shows, and movies!

**Don't just play Minecraft—experience it with superpowers!**

## 🦸‍♂️ FEATURES

*   **60+ Unique Suits** spanning multiple universes
*   **Custom Abilities** for each character (flight, super strength, heat vision, and more!)
*   **Crafting System** to create your favorite hero suits
*   **Specialized Weapons & Gadgets** for tech-based heroes
*   **Dynamic Abilities** that interact with the environment
*   **Constructs System** for Green Lantern and other energy-based heroes
*   **Visual Effects & Animations** that bring your powers to life
*   **Decorative Blocks** to create your hero base

## 🎬 Video Showcases!

Our community members are putting together showcases on each of the main suits in the mod! Check out the showcases here:

### 🎬 Superman

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MMeK2mDC3zw&t=10s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MMeK2mDC3zw&t=10s)

*   Video by BiglyShronk: [https://youtu.be/qe\_OXsHM0ls](https://youtu.be/qe_OXsHM0ls)

_Created a video or want to create a video? DM us on discord to get it listed! We appreciate any content made about thematic._

## 🛠️ INSTALLATION

### Dependencies:

*   [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) - For events & rendering

### Recommended Mods:

*   [Point Blank](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pointblank) by vics4games - For gun-based characters

### Known Incompatibilities:

*   None currently reported! If you find any, please report them on our Discord.

## 🎮 OFFICIAL SERVER

Join our official server to play with the community! Just click the "Official Server" button in the multiplayer menu.

## ❓ FAQ

**Q: Do you support Forge?**  
A: No, Thematic is designed for Fabric and we have no plans to port to Forge.

**Q: Will you add \[specific character\]?**  
A: There's a good chance they're already being worked on! Enable "Show WIP Suits" in the config to see all suits currently in development.

**Q: How do I craft suits?**  
A: Suits are crafted using the Suit Bench, which is crafted with iron blocks and redstone. Check the in-game Patchouli guidebook for detailed recipes!

**Q: My suit doesn't work/show up correctly, help!**  
A: Join our Discord for support! We have an active community and developers ready to help with any issues.
